requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — Tajikstandart and Barqi Tojik / Donor-Lender Project Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——Tajikstandart及Barqi Tojik/援助方-贷款方项目要求
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——Tajikstandart及Barqi Tojik/援助方-貸款方項目要求

summary.en: Tajikstandart's conformity framework for electrical power equipment references adopted GOST/IEC standards. IEC 62109-1 (Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements) and IEC 62109-2 (Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters) are the international safety standards applicable to solar PV inverters under GOST/IEC-aligned Tajik requirements. Third-party type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory demonstrating compliance with IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 is expected as part of Tajikstandart conformity certification applications and is an explicit or implied requirement in donor-financed project technical specifications issued by the World Bank and Asian Development Bank (ADB) for Tajikistan energy projects. IEC 62109-1 covers general safety requirements including protection against electric shock, overcurrent, thermal hazards, and mechanical hazards. IEC 62109-2 adds inverter-specific requirements for anti-islanding interface, input protection, and insulation.
summary.zh: Tajikstandart电力设备合格评定框架引用了采纳的GOST/IEC标准。IEC 62109-1（光伏电力系统用功率变换器安全——第1部分：通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（第2部分：逆变器特殊要求）是塔吉克GOST/IEC协调要求下适用于太阳能光伏逆变器的国际安全标准。来自ILAC认可实验室的符合IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2的第三方型式试验证据，是Tajikstandart合格评定认证申请的预期内容，也是世界银行和亚洲开发银行（亚开行）为塔吉克斯坦能源项目发布的援助方资助项目技术规格中的明确或隐含要求。IEC 62109-1涵盖通用安全要求，包括防电击、过电流、热危害和机械危害保护。IEC 62109-2增加了逆变器特定要求，涵盖防孤岛接口、输入保护和绝缘。
summary.zht: Tajikstandart電力設備合格評定框架引用了採納的GOST/IEC標準。IEC 62109-1（光伏電力系統用功率轉換器安全——第1部分：通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（第2部分：逆變器特殊要求）是塔吉克GOST/IEC協調要求下適用於太陽能光伏逆變器的國際安全標準。來自ILAC認可實驗室的符合IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2的第三方型式試驗證據，是Tajikstandart合格評定認證申請的預期內容，也是世界銀行和亞洲開發銀行（亞開行）為塔吉克斯坦能源項目發布的援助方資助項目技術規格中的明確或隱含要求。IEC 62109-1涵蓋通用安全要求，包括防電擊、過電流、熱危害和機械危害保護。IEC 62109-2增加了逆變器特定要求，涵蓋防孤島接口、輸入保護和絕緣。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements (adopted or referenced in GOST/IEC-aligned Tajikstandart requirements)
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters (adopted or referenced in GOST/IEC-aligned Tajikstandart requirements)
Tajikstandart — Agency for Standardization, Metrology, Certification and Trade Inspection — conformity certification authority
World Bank / ADB project technical specifications for Tajikistan energy sector projects (reference IEC 62109 for solar PV inverters)

summary.en: China's primary voluntary standard for PV grid-connected inverter safety is GB/T 37408-2019 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which covers safety classification, environmental conditions, electrical performance, and EMC. GB/T 37408 is assessed by CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. It shares safety concepts with IEC 62109-1/-2 but is not harmonised with IEC 62109 and is not accepted by Tajikstandart or by World Bank / ADB project procurement as equivalent to IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence. Chinese manufacturers may also hold IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates from ILAC-accredited international laboratories — these are directly usable for Tajikstandart applications if they cover the specific model supplied.
summary.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器安全的主要自愿性标准为GB/T 37408-2019（光伏并网逆变器技术要求），涵盖安全分类、环境条件、电气性能和EMC。GB/T 37408由中国CNAS认可实验室评估。其安全理念与IEC 62109-1/-2相近，但未与IEC 62109协调，不被Tajikstandart或世界银行/亚开行项目采购接受为IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据的等效依据。中国制造商还可能持有来自ILAC认可国际实验室的IEC 62109-1/-2证书——如果这些证书涵盖所供应的特定型号，可直接用于Tajikstandart申请。
summary.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器安全的主要自願性標準為GB/T 37408-2019（光伏並網逆變器技術要求），涵蓋安全分類、環境條件、電氣性能和EMC。GB/T 37408由中國CNAS認可實驗室評估。其安全理念與IEC 62109-1/-2相近，但未與IEC 62109協調，不被Tajikstandart或世界銀行/亞開行項目採購接受為IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據的等效依據。中國製造商還可能持有來自ILAC認可國際實驗室的IEC 62109-1/-2證書——如果這些證書涵蓋所供應的特定型號，可直接用於Tajikstandart申請。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 safety certification does not satisfy Tajikstandart's IEC 62109-1/-2 requirements or World Bank / ADB project procurement technical specifications for Tajikistan. Exporters must obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model or family being supplied. Additionally, IEC 62109-1 Section 10 addresses derating for altitude — for Tajikistan's mountainous terrain (sites commonly at 1,000–3,000 m, some above 3,000 m), exporters must confirm that the IEC 62109-1 test report covers the operating altitude range of the installation site, and provide altitude derating documentation. Confirm with the Tajikstandart accredited certification body and project procurement team what existing IEC certificates are accepted and whether re-testing is required for the Tajikistan altitude range.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408安全认证不满足Tajikstandart的IEC 62109-1/-2要求或塔吉克斯坦世界银行/亚开行项目采购技术规格。出口商须从ILAC认可实验室取得涵盖所供应特定逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书。此外，IEC 62109-1第10节涉及高海拔降额——对于塔吉克斯坦山地地形（场地通常位于1,000–3,000 m，部分超过3,000 m），出口商须确认IEC 62109-1测试报告涵盖安装场地的运行海拔范围，并提供高海拔降额文件。请向Tajikstandart认可认证机构和项目采购团队确认现有IEC证书的认可情况以及是否需要针对塔吉克斯坦海拔范围重新测试。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408安全認證不滿足Tajikstandart的IEC 62109-1/-2要求或塔吉克斯坦世界銀行/亞開行項目採購技術規格。出口商須從ILAC認可實驗室取得涵蓋所供應特定逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書。此外，IEC 62109-1第10節涉及高海拔降額——對於塔吉克斯坦山地地形（場地通常位於1,000–3,000 m，部分超過3,000 m），出口商須確認IEC 62109-1測試報告涵蓋安裝場地的運行海拔範圍，並提供高海拔降額文件。請向Tajikstandart認可認證機構和項目採購團隊確認現有IEC證書的認可情況以及是否需要針對塔吉克斯坦海拔範圍重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for Tajikstandart conformity certification application; mandatory in practice for donor/lender (World Bank, ADB) financed project procurement in Tajikistan; altitude derating documentation is a material requirement for highland installation sites
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408-2019 is a recommended national standard (GB/T designation); CQC/CGC voluntary certification available but not required under Chinese law; IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates from ILAC-accredited labs are available from major Chinese manufacturers and are directly usable if they cover the supplied model

source.publisher: Tajikstandart — Agency for Standardization, Metrology, Certification and Trade Inspection of the Republic of Tajikistan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A solar PV inverter holding only Chinese GB/T 37408 certification cannot satisfy Tajikstandart IEC 62109-1/-2 requirements or World Bank / ADB Tajikistan project procurement specifications. Plan for IEC 62109-1/-2 type testing by an ILAC-accredited laboratory before submitting the equipment compliance package. For high-altitude Tajikistan installation sites (above 1,000 m), confirm that the IEC 62109-1 test report covers the installation altitude and obtain altitude derating documentation. Verify current Tajikstandart requirements and accepted certificates directly with the accredited certification body before committing to a test programme.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有中国GB/T 37408认证的太阳能光伏逆变器不能满足Tajikstandart的IEC 62109-1/-2要求或世界银行/亚开行塔吉克斯坦项目采购规格。在提交设备合规包前，请安排ILAC认可实验室进行IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验。对于塔吉克斯坦高海拔安装场地（海拔1,000 m以上），请确认IEC 62109-1测试报告涵盖安装海拔，并取得高海拔降额文件。在启动测试计划前，请直接向认可认证机构核实当前Tajikstandart要求和认可证书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有中國GB/T 37408認證的太陽能光伏逆變器不能滿足Tajikstandart的IEC 62109-1/-2要求或世界銀行/亞開行塔吉克斯坦項目採購規格。在提交設備合規包前，請安排ILAC認可實驗室進行IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗。對於塔吉克斯坦高海拔安裝場地（海拔1,000 m以上），請確認IEC 62109-1測試報告涵蓋安裝海拔，並取得高海拔降額文件。在啟動測試計畫前，請直接向認可認證機構核實當前Tajikstandart要求和認可證書。

requirement_topic.en: High-Altitude and Cold-Climate Operating Range — Tajikistan Mountainous Terrain Derating Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 高海拔与寒冷气候运行范围——塔吉克斯坦山地地形降额要求
requirement_topic.zht: 高海拔與寒冷氣候運行範圍——塔吉克斯坦山地地形降額要求

summary.en: Tajikistan is predominantly mountainous, with more than 90% of territory above 1,000 m and significant areas above 3,000 m (Pamir plateau). Many solar PV installation sites — including those financed by World Bank and ADB — are located at altitudes where standard IEC and manufacturer specifications require derating of inverter output power, operating temperature range, and cooling performance. Key technical requirements for Tajikistan high-altitude sites: (1) IEC 62109-1 altitude derating — standard type tests are conducted at ≤2,000 m; above 2,000 m, inverter manufacturers must specify derating factors and document performance limits; (2) cold-climate operating range — winter temperatures in mountain regions regularly fall below −20 °C and can reach −30 °C or lower; inverter minimum operating temperature and start-up temperature must be validated for site conditions; (3) donor/lender technical specifications (World Bank Procurement Framework, ADB Procurement Policy) routinely require inverter data sheets to specify altitude and temperature ranges, and for high-altitude sites may require altitude-specific testing or manufacturer signed derating statements; (4) IEC 62109-1 also covers insulation requirements at altitude (reduced air density reduces partial discharge inception voltage — relevant for high-voltage string inverters at altitude).
summary.zh: 塔吉克斯坦以山地为主，超过90%的领土海拔高于1,000 m，大片区域高于3,000 m（帕米尔高原）。许多太阳能光伏安装场地——包括世界银行和亚开行资助的场地——位于需要对逆变器输出功率、运行温度范围和散热性能进行降额的海拔高度。塔吉克斯坦高海拔场地的主要技术要求：（1）IEC 62109-1高海拔降额——标准型式试验在≤2,000 m处进行；海拔超过2,000 m时，逆变器制造商须规定降额系数并记录性能限值；（2）低温运行范围——山区冬季气温经常低于−20 °C，可低至−30 °C或更低；须针对场地条件验证逆变器最低运行温度和启动温度；（3）援助方/贷款方技术规格（世界银行采购框架、亚开行采购政策）通常要求逆变器数据表注明海拔和温度范围，对于高海拔场地可能要求高海拔专项测试或制造商签署的降额声明；（4）IEC 62109-1还涵盖高海拔绝缘要求（空气密度降低会降低局部放电起始电压——这与高海拔高压串联逆变器相关）。
summary.zht: 塔吉克斯坦以山地為主，超過90%的領土海拔高於1,000 m，大片區域高於3,000 m（帕米爾高原）。許多太陽能光伏安裝場地——包括世界銀行和亞開行資助的場地——位於需要對逆變器輸出功率、運行溫度範圍和散熱性能進行降額的海拔高度。塔吉克斯坦高海拔場地的主要技術要求：（1）IEC 62109-1高海拔降額——標準型式試驗在≤2,000 m處進行；海拔超過2,000 m時，逆變器製造商須規定降額系數並記錄性能限值；（2）低溫運行範圍——山區冬季氣溫經常低於−20 °C，可低至−30 °C或更低；須針對場地條件驗證逆變器最低運行溫度和啟動溫度；（3）援助方/貸款方技術規格（世界銀行採購框架、亞開行採購政策）通常要求逆變器數據表注明海拔和溫度範圍，對於高海拔場地可能要求高海拔專項測試或製造商簽署的降額聲明；（4）IEC 62109-1還涵蓋高海拔絕緣要求（空氣密度降低會降低局部放電起始電壓——這與高海拔高壓串聯逆變器相關）。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements (Section 10: altitude derating; Section 6: environmental conditions)
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
World Bank Procurement Framework — technical specifications for donor-financed solar PV projects in Tajikistan
ADB Procurement Policy and Project Administration Instructions — technical specifications for ADB-financed energy projects in Tajikistan

summary.en: Standard Chinese PV inverter certifications under GB/T 37408-2019 are typically conducted under standard ambient laboratory conditions and do not specifically address high-altitude derating. China has high-altitude installation sites (Tibet, Qinghai, Xinjiang) and Chinese manufacturers supplying those markets may have altitude-specific data sheets or derating statements, but these are not standard inclusions in export documentation. Chinese CQC/CGC certificates do not specify altitude derating for Tajikistan's highland terrain. Exporters should check whether their existing IEC 62109-1 type-test reports cover the altitude range of the specific Tajikistan installation site, and obtain manufacturer-signed altitude derating documentation if required.
summary.zh: 依据GB/T 37408-2019的标准中国光伏逆变器认证通常在标准室温实验室条件下进行，不专门涉及高海拔降额。中国有高海拔安装场地（西藏、青海、新疆），供应这些市场的中国制造商可能具有高海拔专项数据表或降额声明，但这些通常不包含在出口文件中。中国CQC/CGC证书未针对塔吉克斯坦高地地形规定高海拔降额。出口商应确认其现有IEC 62109-1型式试验报告是否涵盖特定塔吉克斯坦安装场地的海拔范围，如有需要，取得制造商签署的高海拔降额文件。
summary.zht: 依據GB/T 37408-2019的標準中國光伏逆變器認證通常在標準室溫實驗室條件下進行，不專門涉及高海拔降額。中國有高海拔安裝場地（西藏、青海、新疆），供應這些市場的中國製造商可能具有高海拔專項數據表或降額聲明，但這些通常不包含在出口文件中。中國CQC/CGC證書未針對塔吉克斯坦高地地形規定高海拔降額。出口商應確認其現有IEC 62109-1型式試驗報告是否涵蓋特定塔吉克斯坦安裝場地的海拔範圍，如有需要，取得製造商簽署的高海拔降額文件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — standard test conditions; altitude-specific derating not included as standard export documentation

gap.en: Gap specific to Tajikistan: altitude and cold-climate derating documentation is a material gap for most Tajikistan installation sites. Standard export documentation from Chinese manufacturers does not include Tajikistan-specific altitude or cold-climate derating data. Exporters must: (a) confirm the installation site altitude with the project owner; (b) verify that the inverter data sheet specifies rated output at the installation altitude (above 2,000 m typically triggers derating); (c) obtain manufacturer-signed altitude derating statement covering the specific installation altitude; (d) verify minimum operating temperature and cold start temperature in manufacturer specifications against Tajikistan winter site conditions; (e) for donor/lender projects, confirm whether project technical specifications require altitude-specific IEC 62109-1 test results or signed derating statements. Chinese manufacturers experienced in Tibet/Qinghai high-altitude markets may already hold altitude-specific data, which should be explicitly requested and verified.
gap.zh: 塔吉克斯坦特有差距：对于大多数塔吉克斯坦安装场地，高海拔和低温降额文件是重要差距。中国制造商的标准出口文件不包含针对塔吉克斯坦的高海拔或低温降额数据。出口商须：（a）向项目业主确认安装场地海拔；（b）核实逆变器数据表是否注明在安装海拔处的额定输出（通常海拔超过2,000 m触发降额）；（c）取得制造商签署的涵盖特定安装海拔的高海拔降额声明；（d）依据制造商规格核实最低运行温度和冷启动温度是否满足塔吉克斯坦冬季场地条件；（e）对于援助方/贷款方项目，确认项目技术规格是否要求高海拔专项IEC 62109-1测试结果或签署的降额声明。有西藏/青海高海拔市场经验的中国制造商可能已有高海拔专项数据，应明确索取并核实。
gap.zht: 塔吉克斯坦特有差距：對於大多數塔吉克斯坦安裝場地，高海拔和低溫降額文件是重要差距。中國製造商的標準出口文件不包含針對塔吉克斯坦的高海拔或低溫降額數據。出口商須：（a）向項目業主確認安裝場地海拔；（b）核實逆變器數據表是否注明在安裝海拔處的額定輸出（通常海拔超過2,000 m觸發降額）；（c）取得製造商簽署的涵蓋特定安裝海拔的高海拔降額聲明；（d）依據製造商規格核實最低運行溫度和冷啟動溫度是否滿足塔吉克斯坦冬季場地條件；（e）對於援助方/貸款方項目，確認項目技術規格是否要求高海拔專項IEC 62109-1測試結果或簽署的降額聲明。有西藏/青海高海拔市場經驗的中國製造商可能已有高海拔專項數據，應明確索取並核實。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for high-altitude Tajikistan installation sites (above 2,000 m); required by donor/lender project technical specifications; absence of altitude derating documentation is a common procurement rejection reason for highland Tajikistan projects
mandatory_status.cn: Not standard in Chinese domestic export documentation; available from manufacturers with Tibet/Qinghai high-altitude market experience upon request

source.publisher: International Electrotechnical Commission (IEC) — IEC 62109-1 altitude derating provisions

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] High-altitude and cold-climate derating is a material compliance gap specific to Tajikistan that does not appear in standard Chinese export documentation. For any Tajikistan installation site above 1,000 m, confirm inverter altitude derating with the manufacturer before project commitment. For sites above 2,000 m, obtain a manufacturer-signed altitude derating statement and verify IEC 62109-1 test report altitude coverage. Verify minimum operating and cold-start temperatures against Tajikistan mountain winter conditions. These requirements are routinely enforced in World Bank and ADB project procurement specifications for Tajikistan energy projects.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 高海拔和低温降额是塔吉克斯坦特有的重要合规差距，不出现在中国标准出口文件中。对于任何海拔高于1,000 m的塔吉克斯坦安装场地，在项目承诺前请向制造商确认逆变器高海拔降额情况。对于海拔超过2,000 m的场地，取得制造商签署的高海拔降额声明，并核实IEC 62109-1测试报告的海拔覆盖范围。依据塔吉克斯坦山区冬季条件核实最低运行温度和冷启动温度。这些要求在世界银行和亚开行塔吉克斯坦能源项目采购规格中通常强制执行。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 高海拔和低溫降額是塔吉克斯坦特有的重要合規差距，不出現在中國標準出口文件中。對於任何海拔高於1,000 m的塔吉克斯坦安裝場地，在項目承諾前請向製造商確認逆變器高海拔降額情況。對於海拔超過2,000 m的場地，取得製造商簽署的高海拔降額聲明，並核實IEC 62109-1測試報告的海拔覆蓋範圍。依據塔吉克斯坦山區冬季條件核實最低運行溫度和冷啟動溫度。這些要求在世界銀行和亞開行塔吉克斯坦能源項目採購規格中通常強制執行。
